title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, King, Unknown person #4, Zoro as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zoro has to deal with a rogue sword....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Skull Dome, left brain Tower - pleasure hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You just called the pirate Hunter, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He doesn't stand a change against King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They were all supposed to be eradicated!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those monsters could thrive in any inhospi- table...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: environment the world threw at them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could beings like that get wiped out?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you'll have to find out for your- self!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... close one... I'd be a goner if I used armament a second later...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is he still unscathed? He just blew himself up!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
